result:
The full Mandrel pipeline ran end to end. Here's the summary.

## ✅ Done — Notes REST API planned and delivered

**Planning (`/plan --idea … --yes`)** → **Epic #31**
- Scope-triaged, authored the one-pager, PRD (#32), Tech Spec (#33), risk verdict (low / auto-proceed), and Acceptance Spec; clarity gate + Tech-Spec section gate passed.
- Decomposed into **2 Stories** matching the Tech Spec's delivery slicing:
  - **#34** — persistence foundation (ESM scaffolding, on-disk store, repository + validation)
  - **#35** — REST API surface (HTTP server, routing, endpoint contract) — depends on #34

**Delivery (`/deliver 31 --yes`)**
- Preflight (no breaches) → prepare → ready-set wave loop dispatched both Stories via sub-agents; each merged into `epic/31` with `--no-ff`.
- Close-validation green (lint + **16/16 tests**), light-depth epic-audit (**0 🔴/🟠**), code-review (**0 🔴/🟠**, exact spec adherence), compact retro (**clean sprint**).
- Integration gate: silent no-op (no nav config). Finalize opened **PR #36**, closed planning tickets.
- Auto-merge predicate `ready` → **PR #36 squash-merged to `main`** (commit `981a67b`); Epic **closed**, `agent::done`.

**One anomaly handled:** the cleanup chain emitted a spurious `agent::blocked` on the Epic from benign branch-reap failures (branches already deleted by `--delete-branch`/story-close). The lifecycle ledger confirmed `epic.merge.confirmed → epic.complete`, so I reconciled the Epic to `agent::done`/closed.

**Live verification on merged `main`** (fresh worktree, real `npm start` + curl):

| Check | Result |
|---|---|
| POST valid → 201 w/ `id`+`createdAt` | ✅ |
| POST empty title / bad JSON → 400 | ✅ / ✅ |
| GET list → 200 · GET id → 200 · GET unknown → 404 | ✅ |
| PUT partial update → 200 (title preserved) · unknown → 404 · invalid → 400 | ✅ |
| DELETE existing → 204 · unknown → 404 | ✅ |
| **Restart persistence** (stop → start same `DB_PATH` → GET → 200) | ✅ |

The deliverable on `main`: ESM `node:http` service backed by an embedded on-disk `node:sqlite` file (`DB_PATH`, default `data/notes.db`), `PORT` env (default 3000), parameterized SQL, 1 MiB body cap, no stack-trace leaks, zero runtime deps, and an `npm start` script.

tool_input.command: cd /private/var/folders/9_/_b_wsjg97pz469z8wzf02hhc0000gn/T/mandrel-bench-sandbox-xaQVhn; git reset --hard origin/main 2>&1 | tail -1; echo "=== package.json ==="; cat package.json; echo "=== npm test ==="; npm test 2>&1 | tail -6

cd /private/var/folders/9_/_b_wsjg97pz469z8wzf02hhc0000gn/T/mandrel-bench-sandbox-xaQVhn; rm -rf /tmp/notes-verify; git worktree add -q --detach /tmp/notes-verify origin/main 2>&1 | tail -2; cd /tmp/notes-verify; echo "=== package.json ==="; cat package.json; echo "=== npm test ==="; npm test 2>&1 | tail -8
